name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini safety-blocked response — SYNTHESISED edge case. Real captures against `gemini-flash-latest` (2026-05-19) against deliberately-unsafe prompts return finish_reason=STOP with a polite text refusal instead of finish_reason=SAFETY. The `safety_ratings[]` + finish=SAFETY shape comes from older Gemini v1 docs and likely still surfaces from Vertex AI with safety_settings configured. Renderer handles both paths: this fixture exercises the legacy structured-block path so the UI is ready when it fires.

parts.text: Some prompt that tripped the safety filter.
